MAPSHINE.ToolDescription: Open the Map Shine effects panel to configure visual enhancements.
MAPSHINE.PerformanceGraphicsDescription: Tune how Map Shine looks and runs on your device
MAPSHINE.PerformanceGraphicsMenuLead: These settings apply only to your browser and can help if the map feels slow or choppy.
MAPSHINE.PlayerLightPickerSelectToken: Select a token on the canvas first
MAPSHINE.PlayerLightPickerNoModes: No player light modes are enabled for you on this scene.
